impact: T-088 can verify the browser workflow with local route mocks, but it cannot validate the real Apoth API boundary for `/api/onboarding/start`, `/api/onboarding/consent`, `/api/intake/bootstrap`, `/api/intake/precheck`, `/api/onboarding/mdi/bootstrap`, or `/api/onboarding/mdi/submit` because those route handlers are not present. A future implementation could leak questionnaire answers or mishandle billing/Stripe metadata without this browser-level mock suite catching the route-layer behavior.
title: Real intake/onboarding API route handlers are missing behind mocked E2E flow
